description_long: This is a large, multi-story temple structure with a prominent tiered roof, reminiscent of East Asian architectural traditions. The building features wide, overhanging eaves with dark, layered roofing and gold accent points at the corners. The facade includes a raised platform with a broad staircase leading to a main entrance, flanked by symmetrical railings and a central walkway. The walls are mostly plain with muted earth tones, while the upper stories are adorned with horizontal wooden slats and subtle decorative elements. The rear and side views reveal the building's solid, block-like base and the stepped progression of the roof tiers. The overall design is imposing yet elegant, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A large, multi-tiered East Asian-style temple with dark, layered roofs, gold accents, and a broad raised entrance platform. The structure is imposing, with clean lines and minimal exterior ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance platform, wide staircase, symmetrical railings, and the full tiered roof structure.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the building, the stepped roof tiers, and the open central area leading to the entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, solid back wall and the layered roof edges, with minimal decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the building's depth, roof tiers, and open entrance area.
attribute_ornamentation: minimalist with geometric patterns and gold accent points
attribute_entrance_design: Wide, rectangular entrance platform with a central staircase, flanked by low railings and marked by a geometric motif on the floor; no visible doors or elaborate framing.
